app.name: Recall
chat.delete_confirm_body: This conversation will be permanently removed.
chat.editing_message: Editing message — send to re-run from here
settings.title: Settings
settings.model_hint: Turn on Auto to pick the best enabled model per message, or choose models yourself.
settings.model_unavailable: Not available — add the provider API key on the server.
upgrade.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgrade.body: Unlock every model, higher daily limits, and full control over which models Recall uses.
upgrade.feature_models: All premium models — DeepSeek Reasoner, Minimax, Qwen, and more
upgrade.feature_pick: Turn individual models on or off in Settings
upgrade.purchase_failed: Purchase could not be completed. Try again.
upgrade.restore_empty: No active subscription found for this account.
settings.tone_hint: How Recall sounds in chat. Applies to your next messages.
settings.memory_empty: View and manage what Recall remembers
settings.push_notifications_desc: Reminders, learning nudges, and email suggestions — even when the app is closed
settings.reminder_lead_desc: How early local reminders fire before each due time
settings.calendar_desc: Read your meetings and events in chat (read-only).
settings.calendar_not_configured: Calendar connect is not configured on the server yet.
settings.calendar_expo_go: Requires a dev build — not available in Expo Go.
settings.gmail_desc: Optional — separate from sign-in. Grants read-only inbox access for chat and suggested reminders.
settings.gmail_connect_confirm: Gmail is separate from signing in to Recall. You'll grant read-only access to your inbox. You can use the same Google email or disconnect anytime.
settings.gmail_disconnect_confirm: Remove Gmail from Recall? Signing out alone does not disconnect — you must tap Disconnect.
settings.gmail_not_configured: Gmail connect is not configured on the server yet.
settings.gmail_expo_go: Requires a dev build — not available in Expo Go.
settings.location_desc: Used for 'near me' searches. Auto-detected from your device; set it manually if needed.
settings.usage_exhausted: 0% left today — go Pro, or come back tomorrow.
settings.export_failed: Could not export your data. Try again.
settings.delete_failed: Could not delete your account. Try again.
settings.name_invalid: Enter a name between 1 and 80 characters.
todos.title: Lists & Reminders
todos.empty_body: Tap Add to list or Add reminder to get started.
todos.empty_list_body: Tap Add to list, or create a group like Shopping.
todos.empty_reminders_body: Tap Add reminder to get started.
todos.notifications_hint: Turn on notifications to get reminded before each due time (see Settings → Reminder alert).
calendar.suggested_empty: No email suggestions for this day
calendar.proposal_failed: Could not add this event. Try again or reconnect Calendar in Settings.
lists.group_add_hint: Add items below — e.g. carrot, cabbage
lists.group_exists: You already have a group with that name.
projects.title: Learning
projects.what_to_learn: What do you want to learn?
projects.programming_language_hint: Recall will track your progress for this language.
projects.goal_hint: What do you want to learn or achieve?
projects.goal_placeholder_english: e.g. Travel conversation, business emails, pronunciation…
projects.goal_placeholder_math: e.g. Algebra for exams, calculus basics, word problems…
projects.goal_placeholder_programming: e.g. React hooks, Python basics, system design concepts…
projects.kind.programming_hint: For concepts & vocab — not a code repo. GitHub repos coming soon.
projects.level_label: What do you think is your level?
projects.level_hint: Pick the one that feels closest — you can change it later.
projects.delete_body: This topic and its cards will be permanently removed.
projects.decks_empty: Create a deck to group words (e.g. Week 1, Food).
quiz.incorrect: Not quite — see the explanation above.
quiz.pronunciation_unavailable_body:
Rebuild the dev app so native audio works:
cd apps/mobile && pnpm expo run:ios
projects.encourage: Keep going — try adding {{count}} more words at your level!
projects.coming_body: Recall will add more study tools inside each learning topic.
projects.vocab.coming_body: Word groups, mark-as-known, pronunciation, example sentences, progress tracking, and AI suggestions.
projects.lists_empty: No lists yet — ask Recall to add vocabulary or study items.
projects.journey_all_done: You've covered all starter topics — ask Recall to go deeper!
projects.practice_body: Ask Recall to walk you through a problem at your level, check your work, and suggest what to try next.
search.title: Search
memory.title: Memory
memory.empty_body: Chat with Recall and it will automatically learn your preferences, study topics, and facts about you.
memory.heading: What Recall knows about you
memory.section_hint: One summary per category — updated as you chat.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
terms.title: Terms of Service
login.google_unavailable_body:
Google Sign-In does not work in Expo Go. Build Recall once on your Mac, then open that app instead:

cd apps/mobile
pnpm expo run:ios
login.dev_expo_hint: Google Sign-In needs a dev build. Dev login works in Expo Go.
login.error_bundle: The dev build lost connection to Metro. Keep `pnpm expo start` running, reload the app (⌘R in the simulator), then try again — or tap Continue as Dev User.
login.error_native_module:
Google Sign-In native code is missing. Rebuild the app:

cd apps/mobile && pnpm expo run:ios
login.error_not_configured: Google OAuth is not configured. Add EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID and EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_IOS_CLIENT_ID to apps/mobile/.env, rebuild, or use Dev Login (set EXPO_PUBLIC_DEV_AUTH_ENABLED=true and DEV_AUTH_ENABLED=true on the API).
login.tagline: Learn, organize, and chat — with an AI that remembers you.
onboarding.subtitle: Your personal AI for learning and daily life.
onboarding.learn_body: English, programming, and more — with quizzes that track your progress.
onboarding.organize_body: Reminders, calendar, and email suggestions — all in one place.
onboarding.remember_body: Recall learns your goals and picks up where you left off.
delete.title: Delete Account
delete.message: This permanently deletes your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.
